stemHtml: With increasing altitude, what will happen to VY and excess power?

options.a: VY expressed as a TAS will increase and excess power will decrease.
options.b: V<sub>Y</sub> expressed as a TAS will decrease and excess power will decrease.
options.c: V<sub>Y</sub> expressed as a IAS will decrease and excess power will increase.
options.d: V<sub>Y </sub>expressed as a IAS will increase and excess power will decrease.
